back_translation: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying:
'Command the sons of Israel, and you shall say to them: My offering, My food for My fire offerings, an aroma pleasing to Me, you shall take care to offer to Me at its appointed time.'
'And you shall say to them: This is the fire offering which you shall offer to the LORD — lambs sons of a year, unblemished, two per day, a regular burnt offering.'
'The one lamb you shall offer in the morning, and the second lamb you shall offer between the two evenings.'
'And a tenth of an ephah of fine flour for a grain offering, mixed with beaten oil, a quarter of a hin.'
'A regular burnt offering, made at Mount Sinai, for a pleasing aroma, a fire offering to the LORD.'
'And its drink offering — a quarter of a hin for the one lamb; in the sanctuary pour out the drink offering of fermented drink to the LORD.'
'And the second lamb you shall offer between the two evenings; like the grain offering of the morning and like its drink offering you shall offer — a fire offering, a pleasing aroma to the LORD.'
'And on the Sabbath day, two lambs sons of a year, unblemished; and two tenths of fine flour as a grain offering, mixed with oil; and its drink offering.'
'The burnt offering of the Sabbath on its Sabbath, in addition to the regular burnt offering and its drink offering.'
'And in the beginnings of your months, you shall offer a burnt offering to the LORD — two young bulls and one ram, seven lambs sons of a year, unblemished.'
'And three tenths of fine flour as a grain offering mixed with oil for the one bull; and two tenths of fine flour as a grain offering mixed with oil for the one ram.'
'And a tenth, a tenth, of fine flour as a grain offering mixed with oil for the one lamb — a burnt offering, a pleasing aroma, a fire offering to the LORD.'

'And their drink offerings — half of the hin shall be for the bull, and a third of the hin for the ram, and a quarter of the hin for the lamb, of wine. This is the burnt offering of the month in its month, throughout the months of the year.'
'And one male goat for a sin offering to the LORD; in addition to the regular burnt offering it shall be offered, and its drink offering.'
'And in the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month — Passover to the LORD.'
'And on the fifteenth day of this month — a feast; seven days unleavened bread shall be eaten.'
'On the first day — a holy assembly; all work of labor you shall not do.'
'And you shall offer a fire offering, a burnt offering to the LORD — two young bulls and one ram, and seven lambs sons of a year, unblemished they shall be for you.'
'And their grain offering — fine flour mixed with oil; three tenths for the bull, and two tenths for the ram you shall offer.'
'A tenth, a tenth, you shall offer for the one lamb, for the seven lambs.'
'And one male goat as a sin offering to make atonement for you.'
'In addition to the burnt offering of the morning which is for the regular burnt offering, you shall offer these.'
'Like these you shall offer each day, seven days — bread, a fire offering, a pleasing aroma to the LORD; in addition to the regular burnt offering it shall be offered, and its drink offering.'
'And on the seventh day — a holy assembly shall be for you; all work of labor you shall not do.'
'And in the day of firstfruits, in your offering a new grain offering to the LORD, in your Weeks — a holy assembly shall be for you; all work of labor you shall not do.'
'And you shall offer a burnt offering for a pleasing aroma to the LORD — two young bulls, one ram, seven lambs sons of a year.'
'And their grain offering — fine flour mixed with oil; three tenths for the one bull, two tenths for the one ram.'
'A tenth, a tenth, for the one lamb, for the seven lambs.'
'One male goat to make atonement for you.'
'In addition to the regular burnt offering and its grain offering you shall offer; unblemished they shall be for you, and their drink offerings.'
